race.comment: PURE MELODY (11) is racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third behind Your Chilli, who has since won again. Peak fitness now and is the one to beat. TO DUBAI WE GO (14) didn't fire a shot first-up in the G3 Black Opal at Canberra but this is obviously significantly easier. If she can settle closer to the action, suspect she'll take some stopping. TASSY FOX (10) produced a good effort last start when second over the mile here to make it four minor placings from five starts this preparation. Penza stays on and knows her well, though will need to be on top of his game from the wide draw. REEF ROAD (3) finds the maiden win elusive but has been good in his two runs back and should improve further out to 1400m. THEGIRLFROMPRAGUE (13) has been thereabouts in her two runs back without threatening. Will likely get back from the draw but should appreciate the extra 200m. Watch for her late if they overdo it early.
